title: Valero Energy (VLO)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Valero Energy. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what VLO is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale: " data-astro-cid-s3gwzfsq>Applied to the 5-year normalized FCF base, not the peak. 2% growth reflects minor capacity creep, cost optimization, and growth in the higher-margin renewable diesel segment (Diamond Green Diesel). Refining is a mature, capital-intensive business, so high sustained FCF growth is unrealistic.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale: " data-astro-cid-s3gwzfsq>Based on a 10Y Treasury yield of 4.18%, an ERP of 5.5%, and Valero's beta of $0.73. The 9.5% rate demands a healthy premium over risk-free assets to compensate for the extreme volatility of refining margins (crack spreads).

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
